summary: Iteration 12 - Ultra-simplified schema preferiti card verification PASSED. All 5 requirements verified: single compact row, no 'Visualizzazione attiva' text, no second dropdown, all required controls present (copia-schema-select, copia-schema-btn, add-schema-preferito-star-btn, remove-schema-preferito-btn), UI not broken.
seed_data_creation: Event ID 3 used for testing (existing test data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ultra-simplified schema preferiti card verified. Card contains only: select dropdown, Applica schema button, Star (add favorite) button, Rimuovi Preferito button. All in single compact row. No extra text or second dropdown.

1_single_row_compact_controls.details: Card contains single flex row (schema-preferiti-compact-row) with all controls inline

2_no_visualizzazione_text.details: No 'Visualizzazione attiva: solo Schemi Preferiti' text found on page - correctly removed

4_copia_schema_select_present.details: copia-schema-select dropdown present showing 'Nessuno schema preferito' when empty

5_applica_schema_btn_present.details: copia-schema-btn button present with text 'Applica schema'

8_ui_not_broken.details: Piantina page loads correctly with editor, tavolo/stazione elements visible, export/save buttons functional

ui_verification.card_layout: Card 'Scegli schema' contains single row with: dropdown + Applica schema + Star + Rimuovi Preferito
ui_verification.control_alignment: All controls in flex row, responsive with md:flex-row direction
ui_verification.visual_minimalism: Clean, minimal UI with only essential controls - no superfluous text or elements
